steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase a construction system known as falsework renames the temporary supports. It is inserted between the subject These temporary supports and the verb were removed, so it needs commas on both sides.

steps.title: Choose the closing comma
steps.content: Choice A uses a semicolon, which cannot close an inserted appositive. Choice B leaves the opening comma after supports without a partner. Choice D uses a colon in the middle of the sentence. A comma after falsework correctly closes the appositive. The answer is C.
